prompts.interview_prompt: When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: We already have agentic discovery platforms; why is this different?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Does this prove scientific truth or open-problem resolution?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Can a reviewer inspect provenance without receiving raw private payloads?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: We already have tracing and LLM observability.
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Can the system catch receipt substitution or missing provenance?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Can this be replayed by an engineering team?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Does this map to AI risk-management needs?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Can we show a review artifact without claiming production readiness?
When evaluating a Project Telos proof-packet workflow, how would your team answer this objection: Can human oversight and trust boundaries be represented?

integration_gaps.gap: Generic market-research language can escalate unless proof-packet and Project Telos terms are explicit.
integration_gaps.next_action: Patch or configure Forum route vocabulary with split-lane proof-packet fixtures.

integration_gaps.gap: Forum submit is not reliable until the configured model executor returns valid JSON.
integration_gaps.next_action: Add an executor health receipt before treating Forum submit as a steelman source.

integration_gaps.gap: Forum route reports one lane or escalation, while proof-packet market work needs a split-lane envelope.
integration_gaps.next_action: Define a ForumRouteBridge/v1 envelope with primary, secondary, and handoff lanes.

lane_taxonomy.purpose: Own the proof-packet substrate, receipts, schemas, Crucible verdicts, and replay boundaries.
Own current market, whitepaper, competitor, buyer urgency, and field evidence gathering.
Own buyer briefs, discovery scripts, adoption narratives, and clean handoff packets.

non_promotion_statement: Pass 0058 creates routing fixtures and discovery prompts. It does not prove market demand, production routing changes, customer adoption, scientific truth, or any natural law.
